name: Binary Search Synthesis — Patterns and Tradeoffs

metadata.career_relevance: Core Binary Search Synthesis — Patterns and Tradeoffs.

hook.what_you_will_build: Binary Search Synthesis — Patterns and Tradeoffs

key_takeaways: Classic: target found → return; monotone 2D → split
Search on answer: define feasibility function; binary search on [lo,hi]
Rotated: determine sorted half then recurse
Peak element: if a[m]>a[m+1] → peak left (hi=m)
H-index: sort + scan with min(c[i], n-i)
Median of two sorted: binary search on shorter array partition
